goal: create a visually appealing animated background for the login page

webSiteDate.name: Bidzy
webSiteDate.description: A platform for online auctions and bidding.

target_Users: Individuals and businesses looking to buy or sell items through online auctions.
target_Users_Description: Users who want to participate in online auctions, either as buyers or sellers, and are looking for a reliable platform to facilitate their transactions.
target_Users_Description_2: The platform is designed to cater to a wide range of users, from casual buyers and sellers to professional auctioneers and businesses.
target_Users_Description_3: It provides a user-friendly interface, secure payment options, and a transparent bidding process to enhance the user experience.
target_Users_Description_4: The platform aims to create a vibrant community of auction enthusiasts, where users can easily connect, bid on items, and manage their auctions efficiently.
